description: Brazilian criminal faction based in Rio de Janeiro, founded in 1988 to oppose the Comando Vermelho. It was formed by Jorge Zambi (Pianinho) and other former members of the Falange Vermelha. The group was involved in drug trafficking, murders, and prison rebellions. It was dissolved in the early 2000s after a rebellion led by Comando Vermelho leader Fernandinho Beira-Mar killed its main leaders.
